compiled_state.title: Add hashFiles() conditional CI skeleton templates to architect-foundation SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add a CI Skeleton Templates section to plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md with per-stack YAML template blocks:

1. Python block: language-setup step gated on hashFiles('requirements.txt') != '' (or pyproject.toml/poetry.lock)
2. Node/JS block: language-setup step gated on hashFiles('package-lock.json') != '' (or yarn.lock)
3. Ruby block: language-setup step gated on hashFiles('Gemfile.lock') != '' (or Gemfile)

Requirements:
- All hashFiles() paths must be root-relative (no leading ./ or /)
- Each block must be self-contained and structurally isolated
- Instructions must tell the LLM to include only the relevant block(s) based on detected stack
- Include a comment/note showing where Epic F's Java block would be appended

TDD: RED test pre-written in previous task. Implementation turns test GREEN.

After implementation, remove RED markers from .test-index.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains CI skeleton section with hashFiles() conditionals
  Verify: grep -q 'hashFiles' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
- [ ] All hashFiles() paths are root-relative
  Verify: ! grep 'hashFiles' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md | grep -q "hashFiles('./"
- [ ] CI skeleton tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_python_hashfiles_conditional\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — CI Skeleton Templates section added to SKILL.md. All 5 tests GREEN.
comments.author: Test
